name: Eggnog Cream Filling
recipeInstructions:
In a small saucepan, combine milk and flour. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens. Let cool.
Meanwhile, in a small mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Stir in rum and nutmeg.
Whisk in the cooled flour mixture, one spoonful at a time, beating the two mixtures together until light and fluffy.
Spread filling between layers, as directed. Makes about 3 cups.
